title: /unlimited
description: Aims to remove as many vanilla command restrictions as possible.
body:
# /unlimited
**/unlimited** is a command mod that aims to remove as many of the restrictions from vanillia commands as possible. Currently this is what is contained:

## Removed Restrictions
- /data merge works on players now.
- /enchant restrictions removed via /powerenchant.
- /ride can now mount players.

## New Commands
- /unlimited - Provides this information ingame.
- /powerenchant - Works like /enchant but ignores level and compatibility limits.
